linkedin_data.about: Hidetoshi Seki is an experienced Global ICT professional with over 33 years of experience.  He is one of the founding members of NTT’s global business development, and has experienced various executive and board positions including strategy planning, service development, marketing & sales, and human resource management, where he gained and built-up overall knowledge and skills for the global business. He is currently a board member and senior vice president of Global Business at NTT TechnoCross Corporation, Tokyo, Japan.  He speaks three languages and possess the cultural awareness, leadership, and experience needed to build success in a multinational environment.… more

posts.content: NTT R&D delivering real world business value!

At hashtag #Upgrade2026, ForeSight Voice Mining was showcased as part of NTT DATA's end-to-end hashtag #AI contact center architecture. Special thanks to Alexander Kloubek and William C. from NTT DATA Apps & BPS for their leadership. We’re also honored to have Imre Vekov and Vijay Krishnanji host and present ForeSight Voice Mining at the NTT DATA North America Innovation Center booth. Thank you to all our partners for their collaboration. ForeSight Voice Mining plays a key role in NTT DATA's hashtag #AI-powered contact center solution— where hashtag #AI handles routine interactions while humans handle the moments that truly matter. This is the future of the hashtag #AI-powered contact center: digital colleagues working alongside human agents, each contributing distinct strengths to deliver smarter, more empathetic customer experiences. …more

Thank you to our clients and to Sudhir Chaturvedi, Tanvir Khan and Margo Cooke for an inspiring Silicon Valley NTT DATA, Inc. North America Client Advisory Council! In addition to candid discussions to shape our thinking and shared future, Timothy McKenna and I provided a preview of hashtag #Upgrade2026 — who knew “integrated lithium niobate photonics for quantum technologies” could be so much fun??? Thanks also to Kazuhiro (Kazu) Gomi and Chris Shaw for such a content rich hashtag #Upgrade 2026. Our NTT RESEARCH team demonstrated turning research into reality as we explored emerging technologies from NTT’s global divisions at our EXPO. On our stages, we had NTT CEO Akira Shimada and subject matter experts discussing a wide range of issues including growing energy needs, data & personal privacy issues and medical costs for an aging world. During our panel on moving from isolated breakthroughs to intelligent systems, Bratin Saha, Roli Agrawal and I explored what makes enterprises truly intelligent … learning systems, and the evolution of combinatorial innovations over time (to how they’re playing out in AI today). Powerful week exploring how NTT DATA is accelerating client impact across the full stack—from IoT and networks (Private 5G, IOWN) to cloud, security, apps, business process outsourcing, consulting and AI services. hashtag #ClientAdvisoryCouncil hashtag #FutureFocused hashtag #BuildingTheFuture Vab Goel Fay Hazaveh Costa Nimesh Mehta Tammy Soares Sezin Palmer Paul Bloudoff …more

We're here at hashtag #Upgrade2026 in San Jose! 🎉 Stop by EXPO Booth # 25 to explore hashtag #ForeSightVoiceMining, and visit the hashtag #NTTDATA exhibit to learn about our AI Contact Center Architecture. <Event Details> 📆 Date: April 15-16 📍 Location: Signia by Hilton San Jose, CA (170 South Market Street) https://lnkd.in/gi46ZQwv …more

A growing number of hashtag #CX teams have moved beyond “AI hype” to real hashtag #agenticAI execution — and the early wins look very different from surface-level hashtag #AI experiences. Here’s what’s showing up in practice: 🔎 Execution over assistance: Unlike traditional chatbots or copilots, agentic AI plans and completes multi‑step workflows across systems with minimal human input. 🔎 Operations first: The earliest ROI comes from faster triage, better routing accuracy, reduced average handle time, and fewer tickets to resolve — not from customer‑facing automation. 🔎 Evolving human roles: Instead of replacing agents, agentic AI is lifting coordination work off their plates so they can focus on complex and high‑value customer interactions. This suggests the biggest early impact of hashtag #agenticAI in hashtag #CX isn’t about replacing humans — it’s about redefining what work humans focus on and where hashtag #AI can autonomously execute workflows behind the scenes. 📖 Worth a read: https://lnkd.in/gWqYPHbE …more

Productive and energizing strategy sessions with Amir Durrani’s Global Apps & BPS team on how we can deliver greater client value through AI‑enabled Contact Center transformation. ForeSight Voice Mining continues to emerge as a key differentiator — enabling real‑time insight, elevating frontline performance, and unlocking new pathways for measurable business impact. Always inspiring to collaborate with teams who are pushing the boundaries of what AI and human collaboration can achieve for our clients. Thank you Amir Durrani, Subhashini Desigan, Rajeev Singh, Rohit Puri, Aditya Sharma, Praveen Vallamshetty! …more

It was a great pleasure and honor to meet Sawada-san, Executive Chairman of NTT Holdings, alongside NTT-TX CEO Atsuko Oka, at NTT RESEARCH Upgrade 2025. Having worked with Sawada-san for years on NTT's globalization journey, Team NTT-TX takes pride in reflecting on how R&D has consistently been the cornerstone of our competitive advantage. hashtag #NTT hashtag #NTTTX NTT TechnoCross ForeSight Voice Mining …more

NTT TechnoCross is also excited to showcase their latest innovations at Upgrade 2025! Come connect with the team and see what they’ve been building. Headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, NTT TechnoCross supports customers worldwide through its Global Business Strategy Office and has a sales office in San Jose, CA, serving primarily customers in North America. Their flagship product, ForeSight Voice Mining, is built on an award-winning speech recognition engine developed by NTT Laboratories. hashtag #NTTTX hashtag #NTT hashtag #Research hashtag #SanFrancisco hashtag #Upgrade2025 …more

It was a fantastic experience meeting Kazuhiro (Kazu) Gomi, CEO of NTT RESEARCH, at Upgrade 2025 in beautiful city of San Francisco. ForeSight Voice Mining, combined with ABE (Attribute Based Encryption), is showcasing its potential to deliver real business value through cutting-edge innovation from NTT R&D. …more

It was a great pleasure to join Abhijit Dubey, President and CEO of NTT DATA, Inc., and Ken Katsuyama, SVP and Head of Global Business at NTT Holdings, at NTT RESEARCH Upgrade 2025 in San Francisco! Abhijit highlighted ForeSight Voice Mining as a prime example of NTT R&D's innovative efforts, demonstrating its real-world business impact. Please check out David Cushman’s post for more insights from Abhijit’s keynote. https://lnkd.in/gdbsgB-D hashtag #NTT hashtag #NTTDATA hashtag #NTTTX hashtag #ForeSightVoiceMining …more

header.name: Kenichi Minami
header.headline: IOWN Cross Value Business Department
header.connections: Square GroupConstruction183,219 followersArif follows this pageFollow

linkedin_data.about:
Kenichi joined NTT Labs. in 1993 to pursue research and development of the content-based media analysis. 13 years of his expertise in this field has contributed to the launch of new media-related services within the NTT group, while writing numerous academic papers, journals and receiving powerful patents.
 His career broadens when he was sponsored by NTT and earned his MBA at Thunderbird, School of Global Management, AZ, USA in 2002. After returning to the laboratories, he started a new project with Prof. Lawrence Lessig at Stanford University to fully utilize the capability of Creative Commons, the digital rights expression, by applying latest ICT.
 In 2004, he moved to NTT HQ as a producer of business development. One of the projects he led was "4K Digital Cinema Project"​. It was one of the distinctive projects as it involved global partners from Hollywood, namely, Warner Brothers, Sony Pictures, Paramount, and a local movie distributor, TOHO. The project enabled the full digital exhibition of theatrical movies in DCI (Digital Cinema Initiatives) format. Nowadays, most movies you see at cinema complexes are exhibited in this format.
 He moved back to NTT Labs. in 2008 as an HR manager of the laboratories. His experience in this field has build his skills and strengths on the management of leadership and organizational behavior.
 During 2012 and 2014, Kenichi directed a development team at R&D of NTT DOCOMO. A new platform that provides various APIs of NTT DOCOMO and NTT group's assets has been developed under his supervision. A collaboration scheme with partners from different business field is also available that accelerates the development of new services and applications using open APIs.
 After supporting the top management of NTT headquaters during 2014 and 2016, Kenichi is back again at NTT Labs. leading "Kirari!", a project of immersive tele-presence technology. The techlogy had an immense influence to the launch of IOWN (Innovative Optical and Wireless Ne
